title: Uplifting Silky Spanish Tomato Paella
description: A salty and energizing Spanish dish featuring tomato juice and deglaze fond, made with Mediterranean friendly ingredients
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large paella pan or skillet over medium high heat
Add the diced onion and cook until it is translucent and starting to caramelize
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly to prevent burning
Add the smoked paprika and salt, and stir to combine
Add the uncooked Arborio rice and cook for 1-2 minutes, stirring constantly, until the rice is coated in the oil and spice mixture
Add the tomato juice and bring the mixture to a boil
Reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, for 20 minutes, or until the rice is cooked and the liquid has been absorbed
Stir in the chopped artichoke hearts and cook for an additional 2 minutes
Remove the paella from the heat and let it rest, covered, for 5 minutes
Serve the paella hot, with lemon wedges on the side
